query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS risk_acknowledgements (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  item_id VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  item_type ENUM('risk', 'framework') NOT NULL,
  acknowledged_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  acknowledged_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  note TEXT,
  revoked_at BIGINT,
  revoked_by VARCHAR(36),
  INDEX idx_risk_ack_tenant (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_risk_ack_item (item_id),
  INDEX idx_risk_ack_active (tenant_id, item_id)
);

  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  item_id VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  item_type ENUM('risk', 'framework') NOT NULL,
  acknowledged_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  acknowledged_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  note TEXT,
  revoked_at BIGINT,
  revoked_by VARCHAR(36),
  INDEX idx_risk_ack_tenant (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_risk_ack_item (item_id),
  INDEX idx_risk_ack_active (tenant_id, item_id)
);
